# Handle Types
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AppService/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureAppServiceEnvironmentResource

# DTO Types
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AppService/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureAppServiceSiteConfig # Polyglot-friendly subset of Azure App Service site configuration.
  IsAlwaysOn?: boolean # Gets or sets whether the App Service app is always loaded.

# Capabilities
